chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Income Tax Reference Applications No.283 to 286 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case For hearing of main case 05.05.2025 Mr. Jam Zeeshan, Advocate for Respondent ************ None present for the Applicant nor any intimation received. The matter is pending since, 2016; therefore, cannot be adjourned any more. Accordingly, all these Reference Applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place a copy of this order in connected Reference Applications. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
